mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (user_id, username, password, phone, email, avatar_url, role, bio, status, ctime, mtime, deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatarUrl}, #{role}, #{bio}, #{status}, #{ctime}, #{mtime}, #{deleted})
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, username, avatar_url, role, status, ctime, mtime, deleted FROM user
user_id IN
#{userId}
AND deleted = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
username = #{username},
phone = #{phone},
email = #{email},
avatar_url = #{avatarUrl},
bio = #{bio},
mtime = #{mtime}
WHERE user_id = #{userId}
